title: Guest roasts a resume and views the result
description: A guest visitor can submit a resume roast from the homepage and reach a result page that shows the roast outcome and share link.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid resume file
Select a roast intensity
Select a language
Submit the roast request
Verify a loading state is shown
Verify the roast result page displays a score, feedback, and a share link

title: User signs in and lands on the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can sign in with email and password and reach the dashboard overview.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify dashboard usage stats are displayed

title: Dashboard is protected from guest access
description: A guest visitor who opens a protected dashboard route is redirected to sign in instead of seeing private content.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the sign-in page is shown
Verify dashboard content is not visible

title: Guest roasts pasted resume text
description: A guest visitor can paste resume text on the homepage and receive a completed roast result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the resume text field with sample resume content
Select a roast intensity
Select a language
Submit the roast request
Verify a loading state is shown
Verify the roast result page displays a score and feedback

title: Start a mock interview with a selected voice
description: A Pro user can choose an interviewer voice, enter interview details, and start a mock interview session successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the mock interview tool from the dashboard
Select an interviewer voice
Fill in the job role field with valid content
Fill in the interview settings with valid values
Start the interview
Verify the first interview question is displayed

title: User creates a new account and lands on the dashboard
description: A new user can sign up with email and password and reach the dashboard after account creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a new email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the sign-up form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify dashboard usage stats are displayed

title: Start a Pro upgrade from the dashboard billing page
description: A signed-in user can open the dashboard billing page and begin the Pro checkout flow from there.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open the billing page from the dashboard
Start the Pro upgrade flow
Verify the checkout flow is launched
Verify the user remains on the upgrade journey

title: Continue a multi-turn mock interview
description: A Pro user can answer an interview question and advance to the next question in the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the mock interview tool from the dashboard
Select an interviewer voice
Fill in the job role field with valid content
Fill in the interview settings with valid values
Start the interview
Type an answer into the response field
Submit the answer
Verify the next interview question is displayed

title: Signed-in user roasts a CV from the dashboard
description: A signed-in user can submit a dashboard CV roast and receive a completed result saved to their account flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/roast
Upload a valid resume file
Submit the roast request
Verify a roast result is displayed
Verify the result can be opened in history

title: Public resume builder preview updates before export
description: A visitor can create or edit a resume in the public builder, preview the output, and reach the export action within normal limits.

steps.description: Navigate to /resume-builder
Fill in the resume details with valid content
Update a resume section
Verify the live resume preview is displayed
Verify the builder export action is available

title: Create a resume and see the live preview update
description: A user can enter resume details on the public builder and see the preview reflect the completed resume content.

steps.description: Navigate to /resume-builder
Fill in personal details with valid information
Fill in experience details with valid information
Fill in education details with valid information
Fill in skills with valid information
Switch to a different resume template
Verify a resume preview is displayed
Verify the entered resume content is reflected in the preview

title: Use a dashboard career tool end to end
description: A signed-in user can open a dashboard career tool, generate a result from valid inputs, and view the completed output.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open a career tool from the dashboard
Fill in the tool input field with valid content
Generate the result
Verify the generated output is displayed

title: Resume export stays available within free limits
description: A user can export a resume PDF from the builder while staying within the free export allowance.

steps.description: Navigate to /resume-builder
Fill in the resume details with valid content
Trigger the export action
Verify the export completes successfully
Verify the exported resume remains accessible in the builder

title: Export a resume within the free limit
description: A user can complete a resume and download a PDF while still within the free export allowance.

steps.description: Navigate to /resume-builder
Fill in personal details with valid information
Fill in experience details with valid information
Fill in education details with valid information
Fill in skills with valid information
Download the resume PDF
Verify the resume export completes successfully
Verify the exported resume remains available in the builder

title: Signed-in user opens a saved roast from history
description: A signed-in user can view a previously saved roast result from account history.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/history
Open a saved roast result
Verify the saved roast detail is displayed

title: Open saved roast and tool history
description: A signed-in user can review past roasts and generated tool results from history and open a saved entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the history page from the dashboard
Click a saved roast or tool history entry
Verify the saved detail view is displayed

title: Guest reaches the public roast result page
description: A guest visitor can open a shared roast result page and view the publicly visible roast details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid resume file
Select a roast intensity
Select a language
Submit the roast request
Open the shared roast result page from the completed roast
Verify the roast result page displays the score and feedback

title: Edit a saved resume from the dashboard and export the update
description: A signed-in user can open a saved resume in the dashboard, make changes, review the updated preview, and export the revised PDF.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open the resume builder from the dashboard
Edit the resume content with valid changes
Review the updated preview
Export the updated resume as a PDF
Verify the saved resume changes are visible in the preview
Verify the updated resume export completes successfully

title: Signed-in user sees dashboard resume builder content
description: A signed-in user can open the dashboard resume builder and view the editable resume workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/resume-builder
Verify the resume builder workspace is displayed
Verify a saved CV or editable resume content is visible

title: Reach the linked career tools from the dashboard
description: A signed-in user can browse from the dashboard to a career tool page and see the tool interface ready for input.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the dashboard tools area
Click the link to open a career tool
Verify the selected tool interface is displayed

title: Admin grants Pro access to a user
description: This verifies that an admin can manage a user record from the admin dashboard and apply Pro access changes.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the user management section
Select a user record
Grant Pro access to the selected user
Verify the user is shown as Pro

title: Admin signs in and reaches the admin dashboard
description: An admin can sign in with the separate admin login and view the admin dashboard overview.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin password with the valid admin password
Submit the admin sign-in form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify admin overview content is visible

title: Continue using free access after leaving the upgrade flow
description: A signed-in user who abandons the upgrade flow returns to the dashboard without Pro access being applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open the billing page from the dashboard
Start the Pro upgrade flow
Leave the payment flow
Verify the dashboard remains accessible
Verify Pro access is not shown as unlocked

title: Guest roasts a LinkedIn profile
description: A guest visitor can use the public LinkedIn roast flow and receive public feedback output.

steps.description: Navigate to /linkedin-roast
Fill in the LinkedIn profile field with profile content
Submit the roast request
Verify the public feedback result is displayed

title: Respect the free usage limit for career tools
description: A free signed-in user can generate within the allowed limit and then sees an upgrade prompt when trying to exceed it.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a free-limited career tool from the dashboard
Fill in the tool input field with valid content
Generate the result
Generate another result using the same tool
Attempt to generate one more result
Verify an upgrade prompt is displayed

title: Signed-in user opens dashboard billing page
description: An authenticated user can access the in-dashboard billing page to review upgrade options.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/plans
Verify the billing and upgrade page is displayed
Verify Pro upgrade options are visible

title: Receive LinkedIn profile feedback from pasted text
description: A visitor can paste LinkedIn profile text into the public roast tool and receive visible feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /linkedin-roast
Paste LinkedIn headline and about text into the input
Submit the roast request
Verify LinkedIn feedback is displayed
Verify the feedback reflects the submitted profile text

title: Admin can view core dashboard sections
description: An admin can open the admin dashboard and see the sections for signups, usage, users, and payments.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin password with the valid admin password
Submit the admin sign-in form
Verify signups, usage, users, and payments sections are visible

title: Job tracker allows adding an application
description: A signed-in user can create a job application entry in the tracker and see it in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/tracker
Add a new job application with valid details
Verify the new application appears in the tracker

title: Generate a LinkedIn writing result
description: A signed-in user can use the LinkedIn writer tool to produce a completed markdown response from provided profile details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the LinkedIn writing tool from the dashboard
Fill in the required profile details
Generate the result
Verify the generated markdown output is displayed

title: Admin reviews dashboard data views
description: This verifies that an authenticated admin can open the admin dashboard and review the main operational data panels.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify signups, usage, users, and payments data are displayed

title: Compare Free and Pro plans on the public pricing page
description: A visitor can review the plan comparison and understand the available upgrade path on the public pricing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /plans
Review the plan comparison
Review the tool catalog
Verify the Free and Pro offerings are displayed
Verify upgrade options are available

title: Job tracker allows updating application status
description: A signed-in user can update an existing application status and see the change reflected in the tracker.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard/tracker
Create a new job application with valid details
Update the application status
Verify the updated status is visible

title: Generate a cover letter from job details
description: A signed-in user can use the cover letter tool to create a completed draft from job and candidate inputs.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the cover letter tool from the dashboard
Fill in the required job and candidate details
Generate the result
Verify the cover letter output is displayed

title: Show an upgrade prompt after the free export limit is reached
description: A user who keeps exporting resumes beyond the free allowance is prompted to upgrade instead of downloading again.

steps.description: Navigate to /resume-builder
Fill in personal details with valid information
Fill in experience details with valid information
Fill in education details with valid information
Fill in skills with valid information
Download the resume PDF twice
Attempt another resume PDF download
Verify an upgrade prompt is visible
Verify additional export access is blocked

title: Score a job description match
description: A signed-in user can paste a job description and resume context into the match scorer and see a completed score result.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the job description match tool from the dashboard
Fill in the required job description and resume input fields
Generate the result
Verify the match result is displayed

title: Admin accesses the signups overview
description: This verifies that an admin can inspect the signups data view from the internal dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the signups section
Verify signup records are displayed

title: Public tool landing page is accessible
description: A visitor can open a public tool landing page and view its overview content.

steps.description: Navigate to /tools/linkedin
Verify the tool landing page is displayed
Verify tool overview content is visible

title: Admin accesses the payments overview
description: This verifies that an admin can inspect the payments data view from the internal dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the payments section
Verify payment records are displayed

title: Free user sees upgrade prompt after export limit
description: A free user who exceeds the resume export allowance sees an upgrade prompt instead of another export.

steps.description: Navigate to /resume-builder
Fill in the resume details with valid content
Trigger exports until the free limit is reached
Attempt another export
Verify an upgrade prompt is visible
Verify another export is blocked

title: Require CV input before starting a mock interview
description: A user cannot start the mock interview without the required CV input and sees a validation error instead.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the mock interview tool from the dashboard
Select an interviewer voice
Fill in the job role field with valid content
Fill in the interview settings with valid values
Start the interview without providing CV input
Verify a validation error is displayed

title: Guest sees unsupported file validation
description: A guest visitor who uploads an unsupported resume file type sees a validation error and no roast is started.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload an unsupported resume file type
Verify a file validation error is visible

title: Invalid login shows an error
description: A user entering incorrect credentials on the login page sees a validation error and remains unauthenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the sign-in form
Verify a validation error is visible

title: Admin login rejects invalid credentials
description: This verifies that the admin login form shows an error when an invalid password is submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin password field with invalid credentials
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error is visible

title: Guest sees oversize file validation
description: A guest visitor who uploads a resume file that is too large sees a validation error and can try again.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload an oversized resume file
Verify a file validation error is visible

title: Guest is shown a limit notice after repeated roasts
description: A guest visitor who completes two roasts in the same browser is shown a guest limit notice when starting another roast.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid resume file
Select a roast intensity
Select a language
Submit the roast request
Complete a second valid roast in the same browser session
Attempt to start another roast
Verify a guest limit notice is visible
